name: Sahil Bloom
niche: Mental models, personal development, investing, frameworks

starting_point.background: Former VC at Altamont Capital Partners

phases.strategy: Framework tweets, discovered thread format, first viral thread (Feynman Technique)
2-3 threads/week, named frameworks with visual diagrams, newsletter launch
Multi-platform content system, brand partnerships, speaking engagements
Launched VC fund, content diversified, revenue scaled

content_strategy.signature_move: Custom visual diagrams for each framework

monetization.model: Audience building → multiple revenue streams including deal flow

key_lessons: Named frameworks with visuals are proprietary IP
Threads drive followers; single tweets drive impressions
Visual content is a defensible moat
Platform-native adaptation required per platform
Audience is an asset class — built a VC fund on it

name: Dan Koe
niche: One-person business, content creation, personal development, philosophy

phases.strategy: Scattered topics, slow growth, breakthrough: niching into one-person business
Philosophical + practical blend, one-person business identity, newsletter
High-volume tweets + weekly threads, YouTube expansion, course launches
Multi-platform content machine, multiple product lines, speaking

content_strategy.hook_style: Philosophical statements, contrarian takes on careers/business
content_strategy.signature_move: Blending philosophy with practical business execution

key_lessons: Philosophical content differentiates in a tactical sea
One-person business is both niche and aspirational identity
High content velocity (10+ tweets/day) required for Twitter growth
YouTube + Twitter combination is powerful for different audience segments

name: Alex Hormozi

phases.strategy: $100M Offers book created massive awareness, cross-platform audience lift
Content team, 7+ platforms simultaneously, blunt no-BS tone
Second book launch, podcast appearances, platform authority

content_strategy.primary_format: single tweets (80%), some threads (15%), video clips (5%)
content_strategy.hook_style: Bold contrarian statements, specific dollar amounts, short punchy delivery
content_strategy.signature_move: Blunt, zero-fluff business advice that sounds like a successful friend talking

monetization.model: Twitter builds brand → brand attracts business acquisition targets

key_lessons: Books are the ultimate credibility accelerator on Twitter
Cross-platform audiences create Twitter growth launchpad
Content teams necessary at multi-platform scale
Blunt delivery cuts through Twitter noise

name: Dickie Bush
niche: Online writing, content creation, audience building

phases.strategy: Daily writing challenge, meta-content about writing, partnership with Nicolas Cole
Each cohort (500+ students) created content referencing Ship 30
Resource threads, writing technique threads, multiple viral moments per month
Typeshare SaaS, premium community, content diversification

content_strategy.hook_style: 'I've spent X [time/money] on Y. Here's everything I've found:'
content_strategy.signature_move: Mega-resource threads about writing that become permanent reference content

monetization.model: Cohort course where students become distribution network

key_lessons: Students are the ultimate distribution network
Teaching content creation on content platforms creates self-reinforcing growth
Creator partnerships multiply reach
Resource threads are highest-bookmark content type on Twitter

name: George Mack
niche: Mental models, psychology, unconventional thinking, business analysis

phases.strategy: Named concept threads (Psychological Razors, Mental Machetes)
Multiple 10K+ like threads, became THE mental models voice
Lower frequency but higher impact threads, speaking, advisory

content_strategy.hook_style: 'X [Named Concepts] That Will Change How You Think:'
content_strategy.signature_move: Naming original psychological/thinking concepts with catchy names

key_lessons: Name your concepts and you own them forever
Quality threads 1-2x/month can outperform daily tweeting
Mental models and psychology content has near-infinite audience on Twitter
Catchy concept names have memetic fitness — they spread because people want to reference them

name: Jack Butcher
niche: Visual thinking, design, internet business philosophy

phases.strategy: Minimal black-and-white visual designs expressing business concepts
Each visual became independently shareable, mass screenshot circulation
Turned visual designs into NFTs, created collector community
Licensing, courses, evolved visual style, business advisory

content_strategy.hook_style: Image-first — no text hook needed, the visual IS the hook
content_strategy.signature_move: Minimal black-and-white visual designs that express entire concepts in one image

monetization.model: Visual brand → collectible IP → community → multiple revenue streams

key_lessons: Owning a visual format creates an un-copyable brand
Images circulate beyond Twitter (screenshots, saves, shares in DMs/Slack)
Constraint (black-and-white, minimal) becomes identity
IP (visual designs) can be monetized as collectibles, licenses, products

name: Shaan Puri

starting_point.background: CEO of Bebo (sold to Twitch), investor

phases.strategy: My First Million podcast clips + Twitter-native business commentary
Business idea threads, contrarian takes, playful tone
Multi-format content, podcast → Twitter → newsletter ecosystem

content_strategy.hook_style: Playful contrarian statements, business idea pitches
content_strategy.signature_move: Making complex business ideas sound fun and accessible

monetization.model: Podcast + Twitter build brand → brand enables premium investment opportunities

key_lessons: Podcast + Twitter is a compounding flywheel
Playful tone on serious topics creates a distinctive voice
Business experience backs up hot takes with credibility
Audience enables deal flow for investing
